content.rendered:
}">

At the Chuckstern Murphy Law Firm, we have over 40 years of combined civil trial experience in residential and commercial real estate dispute resolution across Fresno and Venture County areas, including Fresno, Westlake, Thousand Oaks, Camarillo, Burbank, and Newbury Park.

We specialize in handling just about any real estate transaction, including land-use disputes, eminent domain, fraud, and anything that could leave you liable to litigation.

Our team of lawyers is committed to providing our clients with the legal advice and resources they need to minimize risk in a dynamic market and protect their investments.

Don’t think that you don’t have rights in a real estate dispute, even if you’re battling against a landlord, personal friend, or your local municipality. We have you covered.
}">

}">

Most law firms narrow their focus to a particular area of real estate litigation. Not at Chuckstern Murphy Law Firm.

Our wide range of experience extends to all areas of real estate litigation in Fresno, Fresno, and the surrounding areas.

Our law firm has helped clients through various cases; from disputes between landlords and tenants, evictions, purchase and sale of property breaches, unlawful detainer actions, fraudulent concealment, failure to warn cases, and judicial/non-judicial foreclosures.

Furthermore, we’ve assisted clients in reviewing environmental impact reports and insurance policies.

We can protect your interests, whether you’re engaging in a new contract, developing a new property, or even seeking compensation for damage to an existing one.

Just because your landlord owns the property you rent does not mean that he or she can breach a fair and binding contract.

Just because you don’t have the proper insurance does not mean that you are immune from compensation for any deliberate and willful damage done to your property by another party.

Everyone has rights and we’re here to protect them.

At Chuckstern Murphy Law Firm, we have you covered for:

  • Lease Agreements
  • Landlord-Tenant Disputes
  • Evictions/Unlawful Detainers
  • Property Damage
  • Eminent Domain
  • Inverse Condemnation
  • Acquisition and Sale of Real Estate
  • Judicial and Non-judicial Foreclosures
  • Fraudulent Conveyances
  • Deeds of Trusts and Promissory Note
  • Breach of the Implied Warranty of Habitability
  • Breach of the Implied Covenant of Quiet Enjoyment
  • Private Nuisances
  • Pollution
  • Trespassing
  • Boundary Disputes
  • Title Disputes

Resolving Commercial Real Estate Disputes

Our team of lawyers has successfully won dozens of court trials related to commercial real-estate disputes. That’s why we are often called upon for more serious and stringent legal cases involving eminent domain, boundary disputes, and fraud.

Aside from representing you in a public trial, we can also assist you in land development transactions involving permits, easements, and insurance – and all while obeying Fresno and Fresno zoning policies.

Additionally, we can consult you on new land development projects, including environmental impact reports and guidance to help obtain the proper permits.

Results-Oriented, Forward Thinking

You don’t get a return on your investment unless you win your case. That’s why our team works tirelessly and close with our clients to come up with creative and forward-thinking solutions that protect our client’s interests and award them just compensation.

Our goal-oriented approach to real estate litigation has awarded us multiple court victories and has helped our clients save millions of dollars. It’s the reason we’ve been around for decades and will continue to fight for our clients for many more years.

Fresno and Fresno’s Most Trusted Real Estate Attorneys

If you’re looking for an experienced and dedicated group of attorneys to handle your real estate transaction, look no further than Chuckstern Murphy Law Firm.

Find out how we can help you by calling our Fresno office at 415-217-9456 or our Fresno office at 415-217-9456. Or, sign up for a free consultation online or contact us online at our Fresno or Fresno offices.

We look forward to fighting for your rights.

At Chuckstern Murphy Law Firm, we have over 40 years of combined civil trial experience in residential and commercial real estate dispute resolution across Fresno and Venture County areas, including Fresno, Westlake, Thousand Oaks, Camarillo, Burbank, and Newbury Park.
